channel.title: ICYMI Law — News-like Links
channel.description: Popular news-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: Trump abruptly cancels signing of bipartisan bill on affordable housing
item.description:
The president posted on social media that the signing was off until the Senate passes his election integrity bill. It is unclear whether he intends to kill the housing bill.

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 460 · likes: 1198

item.title: ‘This is injustice’: how leftist zines were used to sentence anti-ICE protesters to decades in prison
item.description:
Advocates sound alarm after zines were used as evidence to convict protesters of terrorism charges tied to 2025 protest at Texas ICE facility

🔥🔥 · reposts: 225 · likes: 551

item.title: Will Anyone Buy This Cheap EV Truck With Hand-Crank Windows and No Radio?
item.description:

item.title: The Trump White House Is Over Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei
item.description:
At high-stakes meetings with the White House, Anthropic's cofounder—a "weirdo," per one official—has been replaced by cofounder Tom Brown.
